title: turbinicarpus × amoenulus nothosubsp. calozonus
intro: Turbinicarpus × amoenulus nothosubsp. calozonus is a hybrid cactus species, derived from the cross between Turbinicarpus amoenus and a species of the genus Mammillaria or related genus, its exact parentage is still a topic of ongoing research. While some sources suggest that it may possess medicinal properties, such as anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, I couldn't verify this information. However, I couldn't find any information on the health benefits of Turbinicarpus × amoenulus nothosubsp. calozonus. As a result, I couldn't determine any information on herbal preparations related to this plant species.
